name: nest-native-messaging-workspace
description: Community standalone monorepo for @nest-native/messaging and samples

scripts.test:cov: c8 --all --include "packages/messaging/**/*.ts" --exclude "packages/messaging/test/**" --exclude "packages/messaging/index.ts" --exclude "packages/messaging/**/index.ts" --exclude "packages/messaging/interfaces.ts" --exclude "packages/messaging/tokens.ts" --exclude "**/*.d.ts" --exclude "**/dist/**" --reporter text --reporter text-summary --reporter json-summary --reporter lcov --check-coverage --branches 100 --functions 100 --lines 100 --statements 100 npm run test:report
scripts.release:check: npm run release:check:readme-links && npm run release:check:sample-versions && npm run release:check:pack && npm run release:check:consumer
scripts.ci:docs: npm --prefix website ci && npm --prefix website run build
scripts.security:audit: npm run security:audit:package && npm run security:audit:docs
scripts.sample: npm run showcase && npm run sample:focused
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm run test:cov && npm run complexity:check && npm run complexity:report && npm run release:check && npm run ci:docs && npm run security:audit && npm run ci:sample
